ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL!

REASONING: Throwing rock at Kor — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:10+9=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Kor — Bardic Musician HP: 44/67
--- Kor — Bardic Musician --- HP: 44/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:1+3=4 vs DC 16] FAIL! 2 psychic damage. HP: 136/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Kor — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:14+9=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 29 damage. Kor — Bardic Musician HP: 15/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
